title: V Safety Exclamation Symbol 100 x 100 mm - Self Adhesive Vinyl - Aluminium Effect Safety Sign
features: Enforces Safety Compliance: Clearly displays actions that must be taken to reduce risk and maintain safety.
Ensures employees and visitors are aware of toxic chemical and hazardous waste hazards on your premises
Clear and easy to understand helps to minimise risk and ensure your workplace is prepared
Made in Britain members, based in Poole, Dorset. We use premium materials, ensuring durable and high-quality Safety Signs.
Aluminium-effect self-adhesive vinyl, offers a premium metal look at a lower cost with easy installation.
description: Complies with the Health and Safety (Safety Signs and Signals) Regulations 1996. Ensures employees and visitors are aware of toxic chemical and hazardous waste hazards on your premises. Clear and easy to understand helps to minimise risk and ensure your workplace is prepared. Allows for adequate safety measures to undertaken to reduce the risk of personal injury.
